headline: 5 Reasons to Add CBRE Group Stock to Your Portfolio Now
summary: CBRE's acquisitions, outsourcing growth and strong balance sheet position the real estate giant for gains despite recent stock pressure.

headline: Anuj Kadyan to Join CBRE as Chief Technology & Transformation Officer
summary: DALLAS, March 23, 2026--CBRE Group, Inc. (NYSE: CBRE) today announced that Anuj Kadyan will join the company as Chief Technology & Transformation Officer on May 15. Mr. Kadyan is currently a senior partner at McKinsey & Company, where he serves as co-leader of the Technology Services practice.

headline: Netflix, CBRE Group And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: CBRE named as final trade with expected earnings of $1.13 per share and revenue of $10.22 billion. Weiss picks ICE U.S. Dollar Index.
